title: Beam failure detection and recovery procedures with common beams
abstract: A method may include incrementing, by a wireless device, a beam failure detection (BFD) instance counter based on detection of a first beam failure of a first reference signal (RS). The method may include resetting the BFD instance counter based on an indication of a transmission configuration indicator (TCI) state applicable for receptions of physical downlink channels, wherein the TCI state is associated with a second RS. The method may include transmitting a beam failure recovery request based on the BFD instance counter being greater than a threshold, wherein the BFD instance counter is incremented based on detection of a second beam failure of the second RS.
claims: 1. A method comprising: incrementing, by a wireless device, a beam failure detection (BFD) instance counter based on detection of a first beam failure of a first reference signal (RS); receiving an indication of a transmission configuration indicator (TCI) state applicable for receptions of physical downlink channels, wherein the TCI state is associated with a second RS; performing, during a measurement gap, BFD based on the first RS, wherein a time duration of the measurement gap is based on receiving the indication of the TCI state; resetting the BFD instance counter based on the indication of the TCI state and after the measurement gap; and transmitting a beam failure recovery request based on the BFD instance counter being greater than a threshold, wherein the BFD instance counter is incremented, after the measurement gap, based on detection of a second beam failure of the second RS.
